name: IntroCleanSweep
notes: The intro video stays behind a poster shield until actual playback so native play marks cannot flash; generic loading bars/copy and old loading surfaces are quarantined.
label: No native play mark, no progress bar, no legacy loading surface
description: Game start displays a silent video-only intro with a preplay shield, holds for at least 3 seconds, and blocks old loading UI revival.
compatibilityTags: IntroVideoHardVisible intro-hard-visible-v170 IntroVideoMinFit IntroGuardUIPolish corner-sweep-v166 flow-fit-ui-v164 flow-ui-v165 intro-preplay-shield-v172 intro-no-progress-surface-v172 legacy-loading-code-quarantine-v172 intro-no-loading-surface-v171 intro-min-3s-video-v168 video-only-loading-v168 intro-started-at-zero-guard-v169 intro-touch-prime-v169 safe-area-copy-clamp-v166 input-watchdog-v166 IntroNoOverlayPolish
